economic_notes: Nation operates 1111940 Limited Partnership, 1111940 British Columbia Ltd., and Gitsegukla Hemp Corporation as consolidated subsidiaries. Ministerial housing loan guarantee of $208,306 provided to a financial institution for a loan to an individual member.
notes: Fiscal year ended March 31, 2023 (not 2024). Deferred revenue of $483,186 recorded as negative revenue adjustment on statement of operations. Gitxsan Child and Family Services Society was budgeted at $345,000 but received $0 in 2023 (was $345,000 in 2022). Total government transfers calculated as ISC $6,418,965 + FNHA $2,193,283 + Gaming Revenue $696,212 + Province of BC $694,273 + FNESC $669,548 = $10,672,281. OSR = $814,416 misc + $176,419 rental + $6,954 interest - $483,186 deferred revenue = $514,603. No schedule of remuneration included in the financial statements. Three subsidiaries consolidated: 1111940 Limited Partnership, 1111940 British Columbia Ltd., and Gitsegukla Hemp Corporation.
